scripts.install:both: concurrently -c "cyan,yellow" -n " back  , front " "cd API_5_SEM_BACK && pip install  --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt && python manage.py migrate" "cd API_5_SEM_FRONT && npm i"
scripts.serve:both: concurrently -c "cyan,yellow" -n " back  , front " "cd API_5_SEM_BACK && python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000" "cd API_5_SEM_FRONT && npm run dev"
